---
title: "Match Candidates"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- Embedded Candidate Matching Application -->
<div id="app-container"></div>

<!-- Load the app -->
<script>
// Fetch and inject the main app
fetch('index.html')
  .then(response => response.text())
  .then(html => {
    // Remove the header since we have Quarto navbar
    const parser = new DOMParser();
    const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
    const container = doc.querySelector('.container');
    
    // Modify header for embedded view
    const header = container.querySelector('.header');
    if (header) {
      header.style.margin = '0';
      header.style.borderRadius = '0';
      header.querySelector('h1').textContent = '🎯 Candidate Matcher';
    }
    
    document.getElementById('app-container').appendChild(container);
    
    // Load styles
    const link = document.createElement('link');
    link.rel = 'stylesheet';
    link.href = 'styles.css';
    document.head.appendChild(link);
    
    // Load app script
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.src = 'app.js';
    document.body.appendChild(script);
  });
</script>

<style>
#app-container {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 20px;
}

/* Override Quarto styles for app */
#app-container .header {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 6px !important;
}
</style>
```

## Using the Matcher

### Step 1: Select Jobs

Use the left panel to select one or more job postings. You can:
- Search jobs by title, company, or location
- Filter by employment type (full-time, part-time, contract)
- Select multiple jobs to find candidates matching any of them

### Step 2: Find Matches

Click **"🔍 Find Matching Candidates"** to see candidates ranked by match score.

### Step 3: Review Candidates

Click on any candidate card to see:
- Detailed profile information
- Skills breakdown (matched vs missing)
- Match score by category
- Add notes and ratings

### Step 4: Export Results

Use the **"📤 Export Results"** button to download:
- **CSV**: Spreadsheet format with all candidate data and notes
- **JSON**: Structured data for further processing

::: {.callout-tip}
**Pro Tip**: Add notes immediately after reviewing candidates. Your notes are saved in browser localStorage and persist across sessions on the same device.
:::

---

## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Ctrl+F` | Search jobs/candidates |
| `Esc` | Close modal |
| `Enter` | Confirm selection |

---

## Troubleshooting

**No candidates showing?**
- Make sure you've selected at least one job
- Try lowering the minimum score filter
- Check if data has been refreshed this week

**Notes not saving?**
- Ensure browser allows localStorage (not incognito mode)
- Check browser storage quota (~5-10MB available)
- Try clearing cache and reloading

**Data not loading?**
- Check browser console (F12) for errors
- Verify JSON files exist in repository
- Wait 1-2 minutes after GitHub Pages deploy

For more help, see [Documentation](documentation.qmd).
